title: Mountain Poems
description: The warrior-monk Saigyo's poems of mountain solitude — cherry blossoms, moonlight, and the loneliness that leads to awakening.
introduction: The warrior-monk Saigyo's poems of mountain solitude — cherry blossoms, moonlight, and the loneliness that leads to awakening.

translation.text: I wish to die beneath the cherry blossoms in spring, around the full moon of the second month.
